name: NewsAPI
description: Aggregate top headlines and search articles from 80,000+ news sources and blogs worldwide.
longDescription: NewsAPI aggregates news headlines and articles from over 80,000 news sources and blogs worldwide. The API provides two main endpoints: `/top-headlines` for real-time breaking news and `/everything` for searching the entire news archive. You can filter by source, domain, language, country, and category. The free developer plan provides access to headlines with a 1-month archive, limited to 100 requests/day.
pricing: Free Developer: 100 req/day, 1-month archive; paid plans for commercial use
affiliateText: Building a news aggregator? Cache and serve stories fast with Vercel Edge Network.
